prompt:
A high-fashion surrealist advertising poster for {argument name="brand" default="Crocs"}. The scene is set in a minimalist, monochrome {argument name="background color" default="light blue"} studio with a semi-reflective floor. 
The central focus is an oversized, giant white Croc clog positioned on its heel at a diagonal angle, serving as a backrest. A fashion model with long dark hair, dressed in a {argument name="clothing" default="clean, all-white coordinated sweatshirt and wide-leg trousers"}, leans her entire back against the giant shoe in a relaxed, leaning posture. She is facing right in profile, looking ahead with a serene expression, and wearing standard-sized white Crocs.
In the background, the word "CROCS" is written in massive, bold, white condensed sans-serif typography, partially occluded by the giant shoe and the model to create a sense of depth. At the  top right, "Designed with ChatGPT" 
At the bottom center, a white sans-serif tagline reads: "Made for comfort, worn for confidence. Because life feels better when your feet stop complaining." The lighting is soft, cool, and even, casting gentle shadows and a soft reflection of the subjects on the glossy blue floor. The overall aesthetic is clean, modern, and high-concept.

Make the aspect ratio 3:4
translatedPrompt:
一张为 {argument name="brand" default="Crocs"} 设计的高级时尚超现实主义广告海报。场景设定在一个极简主义、单色调的 {argument name="background color" default="浅蓝色"} 摄影棚中，地面带有半反射效果。
视觉中心是一个超大号的白色 Crocs 洞洞鞋，以斜角支撑在脚跟处，作为靠背使用。一位留着深色长发的时尚模特，身穿 {argument name="clothing" default="干净利落的纯白色卫衣和阔腿裤套装"}，整个背部放松地倚靠在巨型鞋子上。她侧身向右，神情宁静地目视前方，脚上穿着标准尺寸的白色 Crocs。
背景中，“CROCS” 一词以巨大的、粗体、白色压缩无衬线字体呈现，被巨型鞋子和模特部分遮挡，营造出深度感。右上角写有“Designed with ChatGPT”。
底部中央有一句白色无衬线标语：“为舒适而生，因自信而穿。因为当你的双脚不再抱怨时，生活会更美好。” 灯光柔和、清冷且均匀，在光亮的蓝色地板上投射出柔和的阴影和主体的倒影。整体美学风格简洁、现代且具有高概念感。

将长宽比设置为 3:4

breakdown.creativeCore: 超现实主义时尚品牌海报：一个高级时尚超现实主义广告提示词，包含巨型产品道具和极简主义摄影棚中的模特。
breakdown.subject: 服饰
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: minimalist, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
